message:
fix(api): validate cosine_embedding_loss target values and simplify smooth_l1

- Add target validation in cosine_embedding_loss: reject values that
  are not exactly 1.0 or -1.0, returning a descriptive DispatchError
  instead of producing silently wrong results
- Add test_cosine_embedding_loss_rejects_invalid_target test case
- Simplify smooth_l1_loss by reusing delta_tensor node across both
  branches (DAG allows multiple references) and removing redundant
  ones_for_inv allocation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
